principles: Every executable official object configuration has one explicit asset adapter record.
An adapter names the exact GDevelop resource kind and official configuration property it consumes.
Adapters with no external resource are explicit; a semantic asset intent cannot bind to them.
The asset pipeline may only satisfy a resource slot with an accepted artifact of the adapter resource kind.

BBText::BBText.description: BBText uses system font families and has no external resource field.

BitmapText::BitmapTextObject.description: BitmapText receives its bitmap font resource through the official bitmapFontResourceName property.

Lighting::LightObject.description: LightObject receives its texture through the official texture property.

MyDummyExtension::DummyObject.description: The official DummyObject probe field myImage receives an image resource.

PanelSpriteObject::PanelSprite.description: PanelSprite receives its texture through the official texture property.

ParticleSystem::ParticleEmitter.description: ParticleEmitter receives its particle texture through textureParticleName.

PrimitiveDrawing::Drawer.description: PrimitiveDrawing is generated from draw operations and has no external resource field.

Scene3D::Cube3DObject.description: Cube3DObject can use one accepted image on all six official face resource properties.

Scene3D::Model3DObject.description: Model3DObject receives an accepted 3D model through modelResourceName.

SpineObject::SpineObject.description: SpineObject receives an accepted Spine definition through spineResourceName.

Sprite.description: Sprite receives the accepted image as the first frame of its first animation using the official Sprite configuration API.

TextEntryObject::TextEntry.description: TextEntry has no external object resource field.

TextInput::TextInputObject.description: TextInput receives its font resource through fontResourceName.

TextObject::Text.description: Text receives its font resource through the official font property.

TiledSpriteObject::TiledSprite.description: TiledSprite receives its texture through the official texture property.

TileMap::CollisionMask.description: CollisionMask receives its tile map definition through tilemapJsonFile.

TileMap::SimpleTileMap.description: SimpleTileMap receives its atlas image through atlasImage.

TileMap::TileMap.description: TileMap receives its tile map definition through tilemapJsonFile.

Video::VideoObject.description: VideoObject receives its accepted video through videoResource.
